rows.title: Embedded Systems & Real-Time Kernels - Capstone Project
rows.description:
This capstone project requires designing and implementing a complete silicon component block for Embedded Systems & Real-Time Kernels. 

You must submit:
1. A fully documented Git Repository link with your RTL codes, testbenches, and physical design scripts.
2. A comprehensive Design Report PDF detailing your floorplanning, timing analysis constraints, DRC violations report, and power analysis.

**Submission Guidelines**:
- Ensure your repository has a descriptive README.md.
- Double-check setup and hold slack timings. All paths must meet zero negative slack (MET).
- The grade will be assigned based on design efficiency, layout optimization, and timing margins.

rows.title: VLSI Physical Design & Verilog - Capstone Project
rows.description:
This capstone project requires designing and implementing a complete silicon component block for VLSI Physical Design & Verilog. 

You must submit:
1. A fully documented Git Repository link with your RTL codes, testbenches, and physical design scripts.
2. A comprehensive Design Report PDF detailing your floorplanning, timing analysis constraints, DRC violations report, and power analysis.

**Submission Guidelines**:
- Ensure your repository has a descriptive README.md.
- Double-check setup and hold slack timings. All paths must meet zero negative slack (MET).
- The grade will be assigned based on design efficiency, layout optimization, and timing margins.

rows.title: Advanced Photolithography & EUV - Capstone Project
rows.description:
This capstone project requires designing and implementing a complete silicon component block for Advanced Photolithography & EUV. 

You must submit:
1. A fully documented Git Repository link with your RTL codes, testbenches, and physical design scripts.
2. A comprehensive Design Report PDF detailing your floorplanning, timing analysis constraints, DRC violations report, and power analysis.

**Submission Guidelines**:
- Ensure your repository has a descriptive README.md.
- Double-check setup and hold slack timings. All paths must meet zero negative slack (MET).
- The grade will be assigned based on design efficiency, layout optimization, and timing margins.

rows.title: Embedded Systems & Real-Time Kernels - Capstone Project
rows.description:
This capstone project requires designing and implementing a complete silicon component block for Embedded Systems & Real-Time Kernels. 

You must submit:
1. A fully documented Git Repository link with your RTL codes, testbenches, and physical design scripts.
2. A comprehensive Design Report PDF detailing your floorplanning, timing analysis constraints, DRC violations report, and power analysis.

**Submission Guidelines**:
- Ensure your repository has a descriptive README.md.
- Double-check setup and hold slack timings. All paths must meet zero negative slack (MET).
- The grade will be assigned based on design efficiency, layout optimization, and timing margins.

This capstone project requires designing and implementing a complete silicon component block for VLSI Physical Design & Verilog. 

You must submit:
1. A fully documented Git Repository link with your RTL codes, testbenches, and physical design scripts.

**Submission Guidelines**:
- Ensure your repository has a descriptive README.md.
- Double-check setup and hold slack timings. All paths must meet zero negative slack (MET).
- The grade will be assigned based on design efficiency, layout optimization, and timing margins.

You must submit:

**Submission Guidelines**:
- Ensure your repository has a descriptive README.md.
- Double-check setup and hold slack timings. All paths must meet zero negative slack (MET).
- The grade will be assigned based on design efficiency, layout optimization, and timing margins.

rows.title: Embedded Systems & Real-Time Kernels - Capstone Project
rows.description:
This capstone project requires designing and implementing a complete silicon component block for Embedded Systems & Real-Time Kernels. 

You must submit:
1. A fully documented Git Repository link with your RTL codes, testbenches, and physical design scripts.
2. A comprehensive Design Report PDF detailing your floorplanning, timing analysis constraints, DRC violations report, and power analysis.

**Submission Guidelines**:
- Ensure your repository has a descriptive README.md.
- Double-check setup and hold slack timings. All paths must meet zero negative slack (MET).
- The grade will be assigned based on design efficiency, layout optimization, and timing margins.
